esearch Charter People Workgroups Publications Conferences Education Seminar Links FAQ Downloads Search Chess Open House, February 27 The BEARS Center for Hybrid and Embedded Software Systems (CHESS) Open House was held on Friday, February 27, 2:00 p

Open House was held on Friday, February 27, 2:00 pm - 4:30 pm in the Donald O. Pederson Center, 5th Floor, Cory Hall. We had demonstrations and posters of the following research projects: Metropolis - Design Environment for Heterogeneous Systems Mes
- Design Environment for Heterogeneous Systems Mescal - Modern Embedded Systems: Compilers, Architectures, and Languages Ptolemy - Heterogenous Modeling and Design of Complex Systems ©2002-2018 Chess
